title: senecio ragonesei
intro: Senecio ragonesei, also known as Ragone's ragwort, is a plant species within the Senecio genus, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow or orange flowers. The plant is rich in pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio ragonesei include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various ailments, although its use requires caution due to its potential toxicity.
